8e62d6986ba60117f718709afafff4573fc2c3b6.subject: Add PH1.5 source guard audit evidence

criteria.evidence: Governing docs, current phase/current state/checkpoint records, manifests, reviews, development bundles, test output, trajectories, Git diff/log, commits, and quorum/bundle schemas were read or parsed.

Bundled Git rev-parse HEAD returned c8aca2ce34321eca04223400d49852dfa24c604a. git status --porcelain, git diff --stat, and git diff --name-status were empty before writing audit outputs. Both requested commits exist and are ancestors of HEAD.

Fresh SHA-256 recomputation against manifests/all_projects_file_role_index.csv checked 7400 current source files with missing_count=0 and changed_count=0. Existing report reports PASS for the same 7400 rows.
Validated 39 source quorum review, source quorum adjudication, source approval, and sanitized source manifest instances against repository schemas with error_count=0.

All 15 approved decision IDs across 5 projects have deterministic prefilter evidence, four ALLOW_EVAL specialist votes on the same file SHA-256, worksheet fingerprint, and project identity, adjudicator final_state=AGENT_QUORUM_APPROVED_EVAL, approval_manifest status=PASS, and bundle_manifest status=ALLOWED_EVAL. Excluded decision IDs did not enter bundles.

Recomputed 15 approved worksheet fingerprints directly from current source workbooks using source_guard.worksheet_fingerprint; all matched deterministic prefilter, review_input, reviewer, adjudication, and approval records. Each approved worksheet maps to a parsed visible row in manifests/all_projects_workbook_sheet_index.csv and a matching SHA-256 row in manifests/all_projects_file_role_index.csv.
criteria.note: INSUFFICIENT_IDENTITY rows were accepted only for autonomous evaluation after unanimous specialist quorum and separate adjudication; this is not production approval.

criteria.evidence: Inspected 61 development bundle files and 15 sanitized CSV artifacts. Bundle manifests, visible file manifests, bundle_hashes, provenance maps, and artifact SHA-256 values agree. Each bundle has status=ALLOWED_EVAL and approval_mode=AUTONOMOUS_EVALUATION_ONLY.
No .xls, .xlsx, .xlsm, or .xlsb files exist under evals/cases/development.

Content/path scans over evals/cases/development found no forbidden source labels, target-output markers, completed-target sentinels, expected-answer markers, score report markers, thumbnail markers, or OCR markers.
criteria.rg_evidence: rg scans for forbidden Chinese labels and completed/reference marker terms returned exit code 1 with no matches.

criteria.evidence: No .pdf, image, CAD, or completed-reference files exist under evals/cases/development; explicit .pdf/thumbnail/expected/reference/completed scans returned no matches.
No drive-root, UNC, POSIX home, or file:// absolute paths were found in bundle content. Parsed JSON path fields are relative and do not traverse upward.
No symlinks, junction/reparse points, .lnk shortcuts, parsed path traversal values, or traversal text markers were found under evals/cases/development.
reports/harness/autonomous_eval_source_quorum_test_output.txt decodes as UTF-16 and has trailing JSON status=PASS with 10 tests.
criteria.note: The full test suite was not rerun because the repository test runner writes tmp artifacts and the task restricted writes to the two audit outputs.

criteria.evidence: Trajectory, task registry, current state, checkpoint, and continuation records were read. Metadata freshness observations are recorded as non-blocking because they do not alter the generator-visible bundle contents.

non_blocking_observations: docs/01_CURRENT_STATE.md, docs/SESSION_CHECKPOINT.md, and orchestration/NEXT_THREAD_PROMPT.txt still describe the pre-autonomous human approval gate/zero allowed state; newer commits add evaluation-only autonomous approval and sanitized bundle artifacts.
Some PH1.5 trajectory JSON files still report RUNNING even though orchestration/TASK_REGISTRY.csv records accepted/PASS rows for those tasks.
